void-black.$description: Void Black — Primary page canvas — the dominant background where all content floats; not pure black, but a warmthless near-black that keeps contrast at AAA

graphite-surface.$description: Graphite Surface — Elevated card and icon backgrounds — one step lighter than canvas, used to subtly separate surfaces without breaking the dark mood

smoke-border.$description: Smoke Border — Hairline borders and dividers — barely visible structural lines that define regions without adding visual weight

iron-mute.$description: Iron Mute — Muted text and secondary borders — body text at reduced emphasis, footer meta, tertiary labels

ash-gray.$description: Ash Gray — Secondary body text and medium-emphasis borders — the most-used neutral after white, for body copy and structural outlines

silver-whisper.$description: Silver Whisper — Light body text — softer than white for inline body content where pure white would feel too sharp

paper-white.$description: Paper White — Primary text, heading strokes, and all key borders — the brightest mark in the system, reserved for content that must read first

signal-yellow.$description: Signal Yellow — Yellow decorative accent for icons, marks, and small graphic details.

gtkotoheim.$description: All UI, body, navigation, button, and small-display text. Custom monospace-feeling sans with 'salt' alternate glyphs — weight 350 is the default body, 400 for slightly stronger emphasis. The only typeface for everything below display size.

gtkotoheimcondensed.$description: Display headings only. Condensed cut at weight 300 with tight 1.0–1.1 leading and -0.01em tracking — these headlines whisper rather than shout, letting the vast negative space amplify their presence. Reserved for hero statements and section titles.

raised-surface.$description: Surface level 2: Cards, icon containers, elevated content blocks
